vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: Address migrate:vbrief fidelity regressions in scope per #506 D2.

plan.title: migrate:vbrief fidelity regressions (body preservation, trace IDs, narrative shape) (#495)

narratives.Overview: Migrator loses per-task bodies, renumbers FR traces, does not emit Requirements narrative, drops structural sections, diverges from #506 D3 narrative shape, and has ambiguous logging. Per #506 D2, scope is direct fixes for findings #1, #3, #4, #6 (D4-routed), #9 (D3 narrative shape), #15. Other findings resolved by siblings.
narratives.Problem: Post-migration vBRIEFs are not faithful to pre-cutover SPECIFICATION.md + PROJECT.md + ROADMAP.md, violating D3 narrative ownership, losing FR-N traces, and silently dropping structural sections.
narratives.Action: Edit scripts/migrate_vbrief.py to: preserve per-task body/Depends-on/AcceptanceCriteria into scope vBRIEF narratives (body source from SPEC per D2 #14); pass FR/NFR IDs through verbatim; emit Requirements narrative parsed from SPEC; emit plan.edges[] from Depends-on lines (D4); drop freestanding Dependency Graph + Parallelisable Work (captured via #505 LegacyArtifacts); fold Project-Level Acceptance Criteria into SuccessMetrics (D4); align narrative keys to D3; disambiguate migration log.
narratives.Test: Expand tests/cli/test_migrate_vbrief.py with synthetic fixtures under deft/tests/fixtures/ covering body preservation, trace pass-through, Requirements narrative, edge extraction, D3 narrative shape, logging assertions. No slizard/external data.
narratives.Outcome: Migrator produces faithful vBRIEFs whose narrative keys match D3; traces survive verbatim; per-task bodies preserved; structural sections handled per D4.

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, deft/QUICK-START.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Preserve per-task body + Depends-on + AcceptanceCriteria into scope vBRIEF narratives
Pass FR/NFR trace IDs through verbatim (no renumbering)
Emit plan.edges[] from Depends-on lines; drop Dependency Graph + Parallelisable Work (D4)
Fold Project-Level Acceptance Criteria into SuccessMetrics (D4)
Align narrative keys to #506 D3 canonical set per file
Disambiguate migration log (every narrative routed is logged)
Synthetic fixtures + golden-file tests in tests/cli/test_migrate_vbrief.py
Comment on #495 marking out-of-scope findings resolved-by-sibling (#2->#499, #5->#497, #7/8/10/11/12->#498, #14->#496)
